markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize content and logistics for upcoming GrowthX events.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Webinar:** A Luma page for the Nov 19 webinar is live, using a "zero to $100M in 8 months" hook to attract attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**VIP Dinner:** A small (20-person) VIP dinner is approved for Nov 19, with a budget of \~$15k to ensure a high-end experience.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
  - [**Half-Day Conference:** The Dec 4 conference is confirmed; Marcel and Jason will source 4–6 speakers (including Lovable) for the \~2-hour program.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Strategy & Execution

  - [**Objective:** Create an MVP Luma page to secure Lovable's approval and enable immediate promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Core Strategy:** Use a strong hook with social proof to drive registrations.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Hook:** "Learn the playbook Lovable used to go from zero to $100M in 8 months."](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Replicates the success of a past webinar that drew 1,000+ attendees by highlighting a proven system.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**Page Build-Out:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Luma Page:** A recycled page was updated for the virtual format.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
          - [**Form Fields:** Added required text message and optional LinkedIn URL fields for better lead enrichment.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Copy:** Drafted using Claude to generate headlines and a description based on the core hook.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Graphics:** A placeholder banner was created in Canva using existing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
      - [**Zoom:** A webinar was scheduled for Nov 19, 10 AM.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### Event Logistics & Planning

  - [**VIP Dinner (Nov 19):**](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
      - [**Decision:** Approved to move the dinner to Nov 19 to align with the webinar and host the Lovable team.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
      - [**Budget:** \~$15,000 for 20 people.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3216.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Supports a high-end experience (\~$500/head), similar to the previously held Birdsong reservation.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3216.0)
      - [**Action:** Gloria will source a new venue, as Birdsong is unavailable.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3254.0)
  - [**Half-Day Conference (Dec 4):**](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
      - [**Decision:** Confirmed for Dec 4, the week after Thanksgiving.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
      - [**Format:** Breakfast → Kickoff → Fireside Chat → Lightning Talks → Lunch & Networking.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
      - [**Speakers:** 4–6 total for a \~2-hour program.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
          - [**Action:** Marcel and Jason to source speakers, including Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)

### Internal Office Event Setup

  - [**Idea:** Build a portable stage for in-office events and recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Gloria advised against a physical stage for in-office events, as it can feel too formal and create separation.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3077.0)
  - [**Alternative:** Use a rug to define the speaker area.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3077.0)
  - [**Decision:** Marcel will research portable backdrops for recordings instead of a stage.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3114.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3845.0)
      - [Pitch the webinar MVP to Cece at Lovable for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3845.0)
      - [Source 4–6 speakers for the Dec 4 conference with Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3880.0)
      - [Source a high-end venue for the Nov 19 VIP dinner.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
      - [Brief UnderStore to build an email list and launch promotion sequences for the webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=3880.0)
  - [**Ray (Design):**](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
      - [Create final, professional graphics for the webinar Luma page.](https://fathom.video/share/EQ34_x2x3U4CySp5qgV31_qeZtj_4_-s?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
